scripts.ci: bun run lint:fix && bun run --parallel syncpack typecheck knip bun-version-check test && bun run build
scripts.ci:full: bun run ci && bun run storybook:test && bun run storybook:snapshot && bun run e2e
scripts.deps:update:within-range: bun update && bun run --filter '*' deps:update && bun run clean:setup
scripts.deps:update:latest: bun update --latest && bun run --filter '*' deps:update && bun run clean:setup
scripts.clean: rm -rf bun.lock node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/.next packages/*/storybook-static dist coverage *.tsbuildinfo apps/*/.reg packages/*/.reg apps/*/allure-results apps/*/allure-report apps/*/allure-history.jsonl apps/*/playwright-report apps/*/test-results blob-report .oxc_cache **/__vis__/__diff_output__ **/__vis__/**/__diffs__ **/__vis__/**/__results__ **/__vis__/local .playwright-mcp
scripts.clean:setup: bun run clean:install && bun run ci:full
